title: ResolveNameInput
description: Input contract for the resolve-name orchestration: resolve how atlas authors refer to a cell type annotation label.

cell_type_label.description: The annotation label to resolve (e.g. 'Iron-recycling macrophage', 'LC_1').

supplementary_text.description: Already-fetched supplementary material text. May be empty if unavailable.

traversal_dir.description: Directory path where name_resolution.json will be written.
